creator: rwatson@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

This problem is believed fixed in 8.x as of r186061, and in 7.x as of 
r189531.  Could you confirm that you no longer see this problem with 
those changes?  See this PR for a more complete description of the 
problem and soution: 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=132222
